validation.nameMaxLength: Project name must not exceed 200 characters.
validation.productUrlInvalid: Product URL must be a valid URL starting with http:// or https://.
validation.testingStrategyMaxLength: Testing strategy must not exceed 500 characters.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Project
deleteDialog.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: {{name}} — Settings
settings.loadError: Failed to load project. Please try again.
settings.saveError: Failed to save changes. Please try again.

unsavedBanner.message: You have unsaved changes in Settings.

section.title: Custom Test Generation Prompt
section.description: Add optional instructions to steer AI test generation for this project. These are appended after the base system prompt and testing strategy.

field.label: Custom Prompt
field.placeholder: E.g. Focus on edge cases around authentication and rate limiting. Always test with invalid tokens.
field.overLimit: Custom prompt must not exceed 5,000 characters.
field.conflictWarning: Your custom prompt may conflict with the selected testing strategy.

check.error: Prompt quality check failed. Please try again.

preview.title: Prompt Preview
preview.readOnly: Read-only — shows how your prompt will be composed when sent to the AI.
preview.noCustomPrompt: [No custom prompt added — only the base system prompt and testing strategy will be used]
